description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: Get IP details from Barracuda(BRBL) service Barracuda.IP IP details
outputs.name: ip

outputs.description: Type of the indicator DBotScore.Vendor Vendor information
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: IP address IP.Malicious.Vendor The vendor reporting the IP address as malicious.
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: A description explaining why the IP address was reported as malicious.
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Description
